announcement.title: 0.4.17-b3 is now available.
announcement.message: Scarlet 0.4.17-b3 is out! This release introduces the Scarlet Companion Android app — receive push notifications on your phone from anywhere in the world, no accounts required. Scan a pairing QR from Scarlet's settings to get started. Also includes notification sounds per alert type, an in-app alert log, and various fixes.
